description: very easy to set up, customer service, Bang for the buck, Employees are very happy with easiness of system
author: Sarah H.
pros: Ease of Use, and a great value for the money. Employees are able to clock in and out. Great access. Trainable.
cons: Ease to use, easy to fix missed punches, add notes adjust times and to approve. Easy to train employee to use

review_title: Works perfectly but could use some tweaks
description: Love it! BuddyPunch has been a huge tool in simplifying payroll and time tracking.
author: James C.
pros: The ease of use for my staff and how simple it was to onboard the team. Our staff use to submit manual paper time cards, so they loved the switch to a simple digital system.
cons: Variant hourly pay rates didn't seem to work correctly as the currency subtotals did not add up correctly or display in some cases. Also, it would be nice to be able to see subtotal of hours based on category.

author: Carrie H.
pros: Has an app, website, and is easy for the staff
cons: It's not easy to use for the admin side of things, you cannot take to a person. Administrators cannot punch in/out which limits who can be in a small company.

review_title: Simple, Reliable, and Effective Time Tracking with Buddy Punch
description: Overall, my experience with Buddy Punch has been positive. It’s reliable, easy to navigate, and has made time tracking and payroll much more efficient. While there are a few limitations with advanced features and reporting customization, the system performs well day to day and helps streamline workforce management with minimal hassle.
author: Wendell M.
pros: What I liked most about Buddy Punch was how simple and user-friendly it is. The platform makes clocking in and out easy for employees while giving managers clear, accurate time-tracking data in one place. The dashboard is clean and intuitive, which saves time when reviewing hours or preparing payroll. I also appreciated the mobile app and GPS/photo features, which add accountability without making the process feel complicated. Overall, Buddy Punch helped streamline scheduling and payroll while reducing errors and confusion.
cons: One downside of Buddy Punch is that some advanced features are lockeds which can be limiting for smaller organizations. Occasional mobile app glitches and syncing delays can also be frustrating, especially for staff in the field. The reporting tools, while useful, could offer more customization, and integrations with certain payroll systems are somewhat limited.

review_title: Buddy Punch is an affordable way to make time tracking EASY
description: From the time we asked for a demo, through our transition and now on an ongoing basis it has been EASY.
author: Dan H.
pros: It is easy to use, easy to correct staff errors, and the help section actually works! The reports are quick and easy to download.
cons: That we did not sign up sooner. We had been using a clunky system that did not meet our needs and made time tracking a task no one wanted to deal with.

review_title: A great way to track your team's in and outs
description: It was a great switch for us. It's easier to use and track people's in/out and leaves. The picture during in/out can also be a way of fun if you use it to your advantage.
author: Mark P.
pros: It's super easy to punch in and punch out. It's also easy to track the people on leave and so we can plan better.
cons: I don't have anything I don't like about Buddy Punch so far. Everything is smooth sailing from the day we started using it.

description: Overall experience has been great! Delivers as promised!
author: Anthony P.
pros: Very easy to use and setup new employees. Technical support resources are comprehensive and when more assistance is required a real person is readily available to assist.
cons: More flexibility to customize and save report templates.

review_title: Tracking time is Easy, Effective and quick access to Punch in.
description: It's user friendly and easy to access, use and no hassle. Just a note: I am using my personal email below for this survey, I use buddy punch system under my work address.
author: Beatrice S.
pros: It is easy to use to punch in, make notes and edits to allow H.R. make time adjustments. Easy to access on my desktop saved to my favorites, and easy to login, no waiting time. I work remotely so time is crucial when logging in is quick and not delaying connection. I appreciate the readiness of the platform to start logging punch in time.
cons: I would like a report of time card for the week to be emailed to me so I can verify my time along side of my paycheck hours.

review_title: A User Friendly Time Tracking Tool
description: From the first time we used it after we switch from the previous time time tracking tool, we had no minor or major issues that we encounter. Everything is smoothly running.
author: Angelo M.
pros: As a user, Buddy Punch is a user friendly tool for time tracking and attendance management. This is their best feature.
cons: There is nothing I don't like about this tool as of this writing. The tool is pretty straight forward.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Buddy Punch - best customer service around!!!!
description: Love, Love, Love BuddyPunch. They are very helpful. They answer questions quickly and super easy to contact.
author: Nikki B.
pros: Responsiveness. Whenever I have a question, they are quick with an answer.
cons: I would like their payroll to have a place to add a recurring pay item.

description: For the most part it has done what I have needed it to do. It is very self-explanatory. I have been able to figure out most things for myself.
author: Sherrri S.
pros: The scheduling and payroll is easy to use. Employee management is nice so I can see the hours staff are putting in.
cons: Sometimes when people log in and out it doesn't register. We then need to go back in and take the time to fix their hours.

description: Easy business tool for all employees to punch in and out as well as to monitor there times. Vacation hrs. etc....
author: Sheri L.
pros: I like that it can be easily used on the mobile phone and computer. You can locate where an employee has punched in or out. I like how it notifies by email when employee are late or forgets to punch out, and it is easily fixable.
cons: That on occasion my punchouts don't register. Haven't figured out why yet. Also access to certain areas can only be accessed by managers.

description: Easy to understand and navigate. Easy to clock in and out without any issues. If necessary support is easy to contact.
author: Therese R.
pros: I like that it is easy to understand and navigate. I haven't had any issues with clocking in or out. And my time is kept accurately. I can check my time off and keep up with available PTO hours.
cons: I have to have my supervisor to make any changes that have to be made. I am not sure how the message log works or how to use it to correct my punches.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Everything is easy to use. Excellent experience all the way around. Id recommend this program to anyone.
author: LAURA R.
pros: Time tracking was the best part if this program but overall the whole program is absolutely great. A+
cons: There is nothing that i didnt like about this program. I use it everyday to track my time and put in time off request

review_title: it's fine for managers who don't trust staff to work
description: it's a good way for micromanagers to micromanage, however it does not account for the time spent trying to log in to punch in or punch out and now HR has us punch out to the the minute so even if we are in the building and talking to clients or staff in the building we are no longer getting paid as the punch out minutes are not rounded to nearest 15. so we have to sit and start at the minute hand to get our full time in.
author: Clarissa V.
pros: now we autolmatically get over time instead of asking the boss for overtime because if we're stuck at work and we don't sign out we just automatically start acruing overtime. no more working from home for free
cons: HR is now in control of our time and approves all final time stamps including being able to turn on and off geo fence and GPS tracking and changing our times
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Wonderful
author: Madison S.
pros: User friendly, I have never had any issues with this system, able to manage my time by myself for approval
cons: No complaints

description: Love, love, love the App, meets all my needs and is lightning fast, and convenient. Works like a charm.
author: Wendi P.
pros: Very quick to log in and use App. Just one click and you're signed in- extremely simple and easy to use!
cons: Nothing not to like about this cool tool. Just love it. Even when my work computer is down I can still punch in and out. It's perfect! Very quick and never fails.

description: My overall experience with Buddy Punch has been really good. It’s fast, easy to use, and fits perfectly into my daily routine. Clocking in and out is simple, and everything is laid out clearly. I like that it keeps my hours organized without any hassle. So far, I haven’t had any issues, which makes it even better. Overall, it’s been a reliable and convenient tool for me.
author: Eden Jill S.
pros: The platform is easy to use, and it makes clocking in and out as well as managing employees very convenient.
cons: So far, I haven’t experienced any problems with Buddy Punch, so I don’t have any concerns at the moment.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: “My overall experience with Buddy Punch has been positive.
author: Joshua A.
pros: User-Friendly Interface, Accurate Time Tracking
cons: I have experienced sometimes a lag time when logging in or logging out

description: I enjoy buddy punch due to how easily you can access your profile and see the hours you worked and keep track of your hours is also easy
author: wade C.
pros: i like buddy punch becouse its easy to use .also I like it becouse it can be used through the app on your phone. Also it makes it easy to veiw your pay checks.
cons: I have had times where I come to punch into work and I was still punched in ,although i know I punched out the night before
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Wonderful system. Can’t go back to regular punching in and out now.
description: My overall experience is excellent, easy simple to use and it’s overall better than the regular punch in and out time cards were used to. Very modern and easy to utilize. Very user friendly. Whether you’re on time or late. And it allows for adjustments as I forget to punch in or out sometimes. Very awesome.
author: Eduardo R.
pros: It takes the guess work out of how many hours you work. It’s simpler than traditional hour tracking.
cons: I sometimes don’t remember to punch out and it sends a reminder but after a lot of hours. But it’s on me.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: it's all good and clear to understand and see my hours overall it has good time card. I can see my past time cards too.
author: idalia L.
pros: ease of use and quick access. It lets me review my hours before submitting to payroll. It shows me how long I have been on break.
cons: it puts you on lunch if you pass the 15 minute break. it gets me confuse when that happens, but it's not that big of a deal because it can be fixed
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: First time user that has been very pleased. Highly recommend. This app has been quite nice since things can be stressful at times when you first start a position.
author: Marcy P.
pros: Super user friendly! Very Easy to use. It has various different options for employees that can be utilized. Great App!
cons: Automatic clock out after 12 hours is inconvenient at times. It does give you the ability to correct the punch.

description: It's been amazing for my contract workers. I no longer have to keep track of their timesheet with paper. Very sufficient.
author: Fredrick H.
pros: It's very user friendly. Makes my job a lot easier. I used to have to keep track of all of my contract employees with time being written on paper. Now I actually see what they clock in and out. No more honor system.
cons: Haven't really found in downsize to the app. I only use it to approve time for my contract workers. But so far so good. :-)

review_title: Buddy Punch can be your watchdog buddy.
description: In general it is a reliable tracking system. We have had no real major issues with it.
author: Jim R.
pros: We like the tracking of the mobile punches. Most of our crew is remote. Gives us that security and control aspect to see where their in and out punches are taking place.
cons: It may have it but I wish it automatically adjusted their start time to 5:30 am even if they punch in at 5:14 am. Would save adjustments.
